_comment: Authoritative per-account lifetime realized PnL (broker wallet-truth) for accounts whose live per-row journal pnl can't be trusted. Written by a reviewed scripts/ops/reconcile_netting_pnl.py --emit-ledger run from an operator-provided Bybit UM export. Surfaced read-only at GET /api/bot/pnl/broker-truth. Aggregates only (no positions/balances/keys) — same public class as the existing /performance realized surface. NOT a money-DB row rewrite: the journal per-row pnl is left as-is; this records the account-level truth next to it. See docs/audits/bybit2-broker-reconciliation-2026-07-13.md.

accounts.note: Wallet-truth (Bybit UM Change minus transfers), stitched across two sub-accounts (MAIN -1.52 + SUB -261.01). The account mixed spot+perp and switched sub-accounts on 2026-05-10, producing a conversion cohort that per-fill FIFO / per-row journal attribution can't resolve (perp TRADE gross was +768 vs this wallet-truth -262.52). This account-level figure is authoritative; the journal per-row pnl (~-33) under-records and is left unmodified.
